title: Static Accessibility Heuristics, Semantics, and Human Review · Contract Lens: Image Alt Context
summary: The crawler counts alt attributes and headings, then declares WCAG conformance without rendered states, names, keyboard use, contrast, or human judgment. Predict authorization, URL identity, runtime admission, Promise ownership, resource bounds, accessibility impact, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler ts image alt context increment in WCAG-linked static audit with explicit limits. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Classify informative, decorative, functional, linked, complex, grouped, and text images using context and route uncertain cases to review.
Parse bounded JSON-LD as untrusted data, validate known shapes, preserve unknowns, and avoid eligibility or ranking claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
